description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate

You launch both fists into a single target simultaneously. Make two unarmed Strikes against the same target; both use your current multiple attack penalty. If both Strikes hit, the target takes an additional 2d6 bludgeoning damage and must attempt a DC equal to (10 + your level + your Strength modifier) Fortitude save or be pushed 10 feet. On a critical failure, it is also knocked prone.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
